title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 20 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 20 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report September 20 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 20/09/2024
Today, Iron ore futures moved downwards after a higher opening, with the most-traded contract I2501 closing at 680 yuan/ mt, up 0.15% for the day.Traders showed a moderate willingness to sell, while steel mills restocked as needed. The market trading atmosphere was average today. In Shandong, PB fines traded at around 685-695 yuan/mt, down 0-10 yuan/mt from yesterday; in Tangshan, PB fines traded at 700-715 yuan/mt, remaining mostly stable compared to yesterday.
